drivers.notes: Extended-frequency DAD with copper shorting ring
Aluminium demodulation ring — midwoofer in the 2.5-way configuration

description.en: Slim 2.5-way floorstander of the Sonetto G2 line — the 28 mm DAD Arrow Point tweeter sits above two 165 mm paper-cone drivers (midwoofer + woofer) in a lute-shaped cabinet built from wood, leather and concrete. Compact footprint for medium rooms.
description.es: Floorstander esbelto de 2.5 vías de la línea Sonetto G2 — el tweeter DAD Arrow Point de 28 mm se ubica sobre dos drivers de 165 mm en cono de papel (midwoofer + woofer), en un gabinete con forma de laúd construido en madera, cuero y concreto. Huella compacta para salas medianas.
